source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 辽宁抚顺明天全市停课
topics.official_english: Fushun, Liaoning Suspends Classes Citywide Tomorrow
topics.why_hot: Sudden citywide school closure raises public concern about possible severe weather or emergency.
topics.share_angle: Explain the likely reasons behind the closure and how local authorities communicate emergency measures.

topics.chinese_topic: 放弃日本后 澳洲人正疯狂涌向中国
topics.official_english: Australians Flock to China After Shifting Away from Japan
topics.why_hot: Reflects a shift in international tourism patterns and China's growing appeal as a destination.
topics.share_angle: Discuss factors driving Australian tourists to choose China over Japan, including visa policies and travel trends.

topics.chinese_topic: 一组图看未来五年你的城市怎么变
topics.official_english: See How Your City Will Change in the Next Five Years
topics.why_hot: Visualized urban planning content sparks public interest in future development and personal relevance.
topics.share_angle: Highlight key urban planning trends in China and how they affect residents' daily lives.

topics.chinese_topic: 一文告诉你未成年人如何申网号、网证
topics.official_english: Guide: How Minors Can Apply for Online ID and Digital Certificate
topics.why_hot: New digital identity regulations for minors generate widespread discussion on privacy and convenience.
topics.share_angle: Explain the new online ID system for minors and its implications for internet safety and regulation.

topics.official_english: Sun Yingsha and Wang Chuqin to Compete in Semifinals
topics.why_hot: Popular table tennis mixed doubles pair advances, drawing fan excitement and national pride.
topics.share_angle: Profile the duo's journey and the significance of their matches in the context of Chinese table tennis.

topics.chinese_topic: 保安8战清华上岸 正备战哈佛博士
topics.official_english: Security Guard Admitted to Tsinghua After 8 Attempts, Now Aiming for Harvard PhD
topics.why_hot: Inspirational story of perseverance and self-improvement resonates widely on social media.
topics.share_angle: Tell the story of his academic journey and discuss the broader theme of lifelong learning in China.

topics.why_hot: High-profile World Cup match attracts massive global and domestic audience.
topics.share_angle: Preview the match, key players, and what's at stake for both teams.

topics.chinese_topic: 事关医务人员 未来5年有这些变化
topics.official_english: Medical Staff to See Major Changes in Next Five Years
topics.why_hot: Policy changes affecting healthcare workers directly impact public health system and professional welfare.
topics.share_angle: Summarize the planned reforms for medical personnel and their potential impact on healthcare quality.
